name: Chanda's Sour Cream Pecan Poundcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C). Grease a tube pan.
2. Set aside two sticks of butter to soften at room temperature.
3. Separate the eggs into yolks and whites. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form; set aside.
4. In a large bowl, cream together the softened butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
5. Gradually add the egg yolk mixture to the butter-sugar mix, stirring constantly.
6. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour and baking soda. Mix in the sour cream and vanilla extract.
7. Gently fold the flour mixture into the butter mixture using a spatula or wooden spoon.
8. Stir in the chopped pecans until evenly distributed.
9. Pour the batter into the prepared tube pan and bake for approximately 1.5 hours, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
